articles.title: RAG Without Vectors: How PageIndex Retrieves by Reasoning
articles.reason: This article introduces a novel retrieval method that addresses a core pain point in RAG pipelines—relevance over similarity—which is directly applicable to enterprise use cases in finance and insurance.
articles.summary: The article explores PageIndex, a retrieval approach that bypasses vector similarity and instead uses reasoning to identify relevant information in complex documents. This is highly relevant for consultants building RAG systems for clients in finance and insurance, where document complexity and regulatory requirements demand more precise retrieval. The method could improve answer accuracy and compliance in production workflows.
actionable_insights: Evaluate PageIndex for integration into existing RAG pipelines, especially for long-form financial or insurance documents.
